privileged_info_summary: This task involves six synthetic probation supervision cases created via ArkCase API in setup_task.sh. Three cases have expired supervision terms before January 1, 2026: Alicia J. Drummond (2025-10-31), Trevor B. Okonkwo (2025-11-15), and Sandra L. Petrov (2025-08-01). Three cases remain active in 2026 or later: Bruno M. Reinholt (2026-06-30), Yuki T. Nakashima (2026-09-15), and Celeste A. Fontenot (2026-12-01). All cases are standard 2-year federal supervised release terms. The task requires the agent to identify expired cases, change their status to 'Closed', and add closure notes containing 'CASE CLOSED: Supervision term completed. Final compliance verified. Case administratively closed per SOP-PO-12.' without modifying the three active cases. All references to federal statutes (18 U.S.C. §§ 1543, 1343, 1028, 1341, 371; 26 U.S.C. § 7201; and U.S. Sentencing Guidelines § 5D1.2) are accurate.
